title: Ingest and prioritise issues

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Refresh GitHub issue evidence, prioritize open issues, and ingest the prioritization into checked-in planning.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep GitHub as upstream intake evidence; checked-in planning remains execution authority. Preserve the existing codegen deferred-lowest decision.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Update issue priority labels, group issues into compact roadmap candidates, and route dogfooding friction without promoting implementation work.
canonical_core.escalate_when: Prioritization would activate implementation, contradict maintainer deferral of codegen, or require changing product source.
canonical_core.next_action: Validate the updated planning state and close this ingestion plan.
proof_expectations: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Open GitHub issues are refreshed and grouped by priority.
Near-term priorities are represented in roadmap candidates.
Codegen issues remain explicitly deferred lowest priority.

goal: Ingest and prioritise issues from the 2026-05-18 chat request.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

intent.latitude: Update issue priority labels, group issues into compact roadmap candidates, and route dogfooding friction without promoting implementation work.
intent.escalation: Prioritization would activate implementation, contradict maintainer deferral of codegen, or require changing product source.

execution.next_step: Validate the updated planning state and close this ingestion plan.
execution.proof: Planning doctor, reconcile, and structured inventory checks.

invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Ingest and prioritise issues from the 2026-05-18 chat request.

iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: continue the current milestone until the completion criteria are met

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Refresh upstream issue evidence, assign practical priority labels, and make the checked-in roadmap reflect the next selection order.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Update GitHub labels for non-deferred open issues and add grouped roadmap candidates for P0/P1/P2/P3/P4 work.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm the scaffolded plan still matches the promoted item before broad implementation.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml, this execplan, and mutation provenance; GitHub issue labels/comments via gh as upstream tracker metadata.
execution_bounds.max changed files: planning state, this plan/archive, mutation provenance
execution_bounds.required validation commands: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run agentic-workspace reconcile --format json; uv run python scripts/check/check_structured_file_inventory.py --quiet-success.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before broadening beyond the promoted item.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated backlog, adjacent modules, or canonical contracts not named by this plan.

stop_conditions.stop when: The work no longer matches the promoted item or its completion criteria.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: A correct fix requires changing the requested outcome or ownership boundary.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Implementation needs files outside the filled execution bounds.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: The selected proof cannot demonstrate the completion criteria.

context_budget.live working set: This execplan, the promoted item, and the narrow files needed for the current implementation step.
context_budget.recoverable later: Repo background, historical reviews, and deferred backlog unless compact outputs point there.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run, proof_report, finished_run_review, and closeout_distillation before pausing.
context_budget.pre-work config pull: Use compact config/startup/summary outputs before opening raw planning or routing files.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: Route to the narrowest relevant memory only when the task needs durable repo knowledge.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Issue labels updated; roadmap candidates added; validate and close ingestion plan.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Proof failure, scope drift, interruption, handoff, or closeout.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Refresh GitHub issue evidence, prioritize open issues, and ingest the prioritization into checked-in planning.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Keep GitHub as upstream intake evidence; checked-in planning remains execution authority. Preserve the existing codegen deferred-lowest decision.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Update issue priority labels, group issues into compact roadmap candidates, and route dogfooding friction without promoting implementation work.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: Prioritization would activate implementation, contradict maintainer deferral of codegen, or require changing product source.

post_decomposition_delegation.decision rule: After this slice is bounded, decide whether direct work, read-only exploration, implementation handoff, validation handoff, or stronger review improves quality or saves tokens safely.
post_decomposition_delegation.required evidence: slice id, route, reason, quality risk, token-saving class, read-first refs, write scope, proof burden, stop conditions, and return contract

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Preserve the larger intended outcome separately from this bounded slice.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Keep the slice bounded while carrying any larger follow-on through explicit continuation fields.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Did this slice advance the declared larger outcome, or only complete the local task?

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: The request was to ingest and prioritise, not implement; future work is represented as candidates rather than active execution.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: GitHub labels updated; state.toml contains P0/P1/P2/P3/P4 grouped candidates; reconcile reports all open issues tracked.
closure_check.reopen trigger: New open issues appear untracked after external-intent refresh or maintainer changes priority direction.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
signals routed: #1035 already tracks start over-routing broad roadmap promotion for narrow tasks.
#1046 already tracks provenance friction from normal planning edits requiring recovery stamping.
